summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Intelligence Hub - 5 AI Features. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 tabs verified, role-based access working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Intelligence Hub has 5 features: Risk Scoring, Document Summarization, Smart Notary Matching, Fraud Dashboard (admin/notary only), Voice Authentication. All backend APIs verified working. Frontend tabs render correctly with proper role-based access control.

risk_scoring.test_risk_score_success: PASS - Returns risk_score, risk_level, risks array, missing_clauses, anomalies

document_summarization.test_summarize_success: PASS - Returns summary, key_terms, parties_involved, critical_dates, financial_obligations

smart_notary_matching.test_match_notary_success: PASS - Returns recommendations sorted by match_score

fraud_analytics.test_fraud_analytics_admin_success: PASS - Admin can access, returns threat_level, stats, alerts

analysis_history.test_history_success: PASS - Returns analyses array and total count

ai_intelligence_hub_page.breadcrumbs: PASS - Shows Dashboard > AI Intelligence Hub
ai_intelligence_hub_page.header: PASS - Shows 'AI Intelligence Hub' with GPT-5.2 description

role_based_tab_visibility.regular_user_tabs: PASS - Sees 4 tabs (Risk Scoring, Summarizer, Notary Match, Voice Auth)
role_based_tab_visibility.regular_user_no_fraud: PASS - Does NOT see Fraud Dashboard tab
role_based_tab_visibility.admin_tabs: PASS - Sees all 5 tabs including Fraud Dashboard
role_based_tab_visibility.notary_tabs: PASS - Sees all 5 tabs including Fraud Dashboard

fraud_dashboard_tab.threat_level_banner: PASS - Shows 'THREAT LEVEL: NORMAL' with alert counts
fraud_dashboard_tab.stats_grid: PASS - Shows Ceremonies, Failed, Escalated, Documents, Escrows, Duplicates
fraud_dashboard_tab.active_alerts_list: PASS - Shows alerts with severity badges

dashboard_integration.ai_hub_button: PASS - data-testid='ai-hub-btn' visible in AI Intelligence section

features_verified.history_api: PASS - GET /api/ai-intelligence/history returns user's analysis history
features_verified.role_based_access: PASS - Fraud Dashboard only visible to admin/notary
features_verified.gpt52_integration: PASS - Uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (demo fallback when key not set)

mocked_apis.voice_auth_demo: Voice auth returns demo result when no audio_base64 provided
mocked_apis.risk_scoring_demo: Returns demo risk analysis when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not set
mocked_apis.summarization_demo: Returns demo summary when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not set
